name: simplified-ai
description: Generate AI images, manage social media, and operate project boards with Simplified from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create media, manage social posts, and organize project work.
interface.longDescription: Simplified for AI brings image generation, social media, and project-management workflows into Codex through Agent Skills and the hosted Simplified MCP connector. Generate reusable image assets, draft and schedule social content, review analytics, and safely manage boards, statuses, tasks, assignees, comments, and dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Generate a social image with Simplified.
Draft a post for my connected channels.
Show my active Simplified project tasks.
